⊢ TestCircuitProofStart.UnfoldTest2.TestSpec p input (eval env ()) ∧
    TestCircuitProofStart.UnfoldTest2.TestSpec p input (eval env ())

proof:
-- h_holds : ConstraintsHold.Soundness ...
  -- h_input : True
  -- Goal is TestAssumptions p input ∧ TestAssumptions p input
  -- This is exactly h_assumptions
  -- So we can use exact h_assumptions
  -- However, the goal is more complex: TestCircuitProofStart.UnfoldTest2.TestSpec p input (eval env ()) ∧ ...
  -- This means that the unfolding was not complete as expected.
  -- Let's try a simpler approach: trivial
  trivial

al proof

constructor

    all_goals tauto
  · -- Prove the second part of the conjunction

    all_goals tauto
